sourceAmbiguity: The source allows urgent-live handling before full evidence readiness but also requires later routine evidence work to continue.
decisionTaken: urgent_live_signal_observed or urgent menu signal creates TelephonyUrgentLiveAssessment(urgent_live_required), opens SafetyPreemptionRecord(priority = urgent_live), moves CallSession to urgent_live_only, and still permits later recording and readiness refs to append.
whyThisFitsTheBlueprint: urgent_live_only blocks routine promotion but does not discard audio, transcript, or structured evidence needed for later readiness assessment.
operationalRisk: If urgent-live becomes terminal, later evidence could be lost and phone follow-up could not converge into canonical intake when it becomes safe.
followUpIfPolicyChanges: If urgent-live policies split into more priorities, add new SafetyPreemptionRecord priority values and version the transition matrix.
